title: 🧠 Memory Erosion Fields
name: Memory Erosion Fields
what_it_is: Zones where data, memory, or identity slowly fades—modeled as dissipating information entropy or neural signal loss.
how_to_use: she walks through a memory erosion field—each step less real than the last
his name erodes as he enters—letters vanishing, meaning scattered
animation_behavior: Letters disappear, identity pixels dissolve, form glitches then fades ---
